subject: Humanoid warrior in orange gi surging with blue-white lightning energy, powering up in a dramatic stance
description: A humanoid figure in an orange martial arts gi stands in a wide power-up stance, arms extended outward, body surrounded by a crackling blue-white lightning aura. The background is an explosive burst of white and electric blue light, suggesting massive energy output. The figure's hair appears light in the low-resolution image — consistent with a powered-up transformation state. The overall composition conveys intense physical and spiritual energy rather than any weapon or tool.
foreground: humanoid figure in orange gi, arms spread, surrounded by blue-white lightning aura
background: explosive burst of white and electric blue light energy
emotion: intense concentration, body language of explosive power release
